rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MICHAEL COOMBS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Injunction Against The Filing Of Any Litigation To Further Litigate Matters Already Litigated In This Action, And A Prefiling Order Requiring Cunningham To Obtain Leave Of Court Before Filing Any Further Litigation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of J. Scott Mckay
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 3, 2015, line 1. PETITIONERS MICHAEL COOMBS and TAMARA WOODS' Motion For Injunction Against The Filing Of Any Litigation To Further Litigate Matters Already Litigated In This Action, And A Prefiling Order Requiring Cunningham To Obtain Leave Of Court Before Filing Any Further Litigation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration Of J. Scott Mckay is continued to June 18, 2015 to give moving party an opportunity to file a substantive reply. Reply, if any, shall be filed and served no later than June 12, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross-Complainants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To C.C.P. §425.16 Against Cross-Defendants And Attorneys Jose A. Cordova And Matthew W. Kumin
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 3, 2015, line 4. CROSS COMPLAINANT KATIE HOM'S Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs Pursuant To C.C.P. §425.16 Against Cross-Defendants And Attorneys Jose A. Cordova And Matthew W. Kumin is continued to July 2, 2015 to give moving party an opportunity to comply with SFR 2.6B and deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to department 501 no later than June 12, 105 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of the courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. = (501/REQ)
